phase-0.notes: Modelo mental do repositorio — Phase 0 do analyze-and-improve. 172 linhas MD + 360 linhas YAML com file:line references.

phase-1.notes: Extracao de conhecimento — Phase 1. 266 linhas MD + 271 linhas YAML. 6 frameworks, 9 patterns, 10 operational lessons, 11 tradeoffs, 9 failure patterns, synthesis.

phase-2.notes: Extracao de padroes reutilizaveis — Phase 2. 15 padroes com 6 campos cada + components + flow.

phase-4.notes: Geracao de artefatos e roadmap — Phase 4. 6 canonical docs + integration roadmap.

phase-5.notes: Integracao — Phase 5. system-of-record updated com 6 canonical docs + analise. last_updated: 2026-06-11.
